final:
module RefModule (
	input clk,
	input load,
	input [7:0] load_value,
	output reg [7:0] count);

	  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (load) begin
			count <= load_value;
		end else begin
			count <= count + 1;
		end
	end
endmodule
